\tzpentry{ID5844}{Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5844 introduces Gyromagnetic Hamiltonian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}(t) = \int_V \mathbf{A}(\mathbf{r},t) \cdot \mathbf{B}(\mathbf{r},t) d^3r - \frac{\boldsymbol{\omega}_{gyro}}{c^2} \int_V \mathbf{r} \times (\mathbf{E} \times \mathbf{B}) d^3r \end{equation}
